query: backlit silhouette obscured anonymous figure against bright window subject in shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: backlit silhouette — anonymous figures, identity erased by exposure choice, sinister window-light contrejour

response.objective_caption: A child stands with their back to the viewer in front of a four-pane window, appearing as a dark silhouette against the daylight. Outside, a cream-colored residential building with dark roofing and visible windows is surrounded by green trees and shrubs under an overcast sky. The window frame is dark, and faint spots or streaks mark the glass surface.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A child stands before a four-pane window as a featureless silhouette created by extreme underexposure that crushes all shadow detail into solid black. Through the glass, a cream-colored house with dark roofing, green trees, and an overcast sky are visible in muted tones. The heavy contrast, dim interior, and solitary figure combine to evoke an atmosphere of melancholy, isolation, and quiet unease.
